And the gift thing and it's not on the order form in the back. Yeah, but we never say we did it we didn't test it we didn't test it against that Four years ago. We had it as part of our catalog and in the following year we tested as a separate sheet There's other variables, but our sales went up dramatically The best variable is is it there's one in the catalog And a loose one Yeah, and that's what we just did with the supercommon store So they use the loose one they keep the catalog around they still got an order form the other thing I'll tell you we got a big bump with magazine ad years ago in Success Magazine And you would think this is the dumbest thing you've ever heard But because we were running a coupon ad I Added the language. There's no need to destroy your magazine. Just make a photocopy of this coupon Now seemingly you think everybody could figure that out, but I got a bump in the ad the minute I did it So they weren't sending a coupon in because they didn't want to tear the magazine up and they weren't smart enough to think shit I can walk over to the photocopier The other thing you got to think about with catalogs, and I don't know if you've tested this saw us the question is Is is the reply envelope bound inside so they can send you People Is there a reason why you stopped I think it was because we used to have a tear off in the envelope and it was really that only about oh Five percent of our sales are now coming through the mail The rest are coming through phone or by web, but what was the percentage when you were putting the envelope in? I don't remember that it was like it's been about five years. You want to go look See a lot of people have made an erroneous assumption about all of this and taken them out For no empirical evidence reason so like an analogy is the the self-contained booklets like the Ken Roberts booklet that you mailed to sell a course You'll see the smart guys have the envelopes in because it's still a Significant percentage of people especially those who prefer to pay by check now of course it gives you checks but still there's a lot of people who just that's the way they want to buy and And I would go back and look at your stat when you were still doing it and maybe run a fresh test See because the fact that only five percent are coming that way what you don't know is how many aren't coming at all See that right that's what you don't yeah, because they're not going to order by phone and not going to order on a web So they don't order at all and We would think see we start to think well everybody's online and Everybody knows the toll-free number and so this is like antiquated But it's not necessarily antiquated and it's obviously demographic dependent too So I will tell you that if a lot of you if a lot of your customers are like pizzas if they're 50 plus and certainly if they're 60 plus my bet is you get a bump putting the envelope back in I Get almost 25% who send in $5 checks or $5 just get my information So they're given Online phone or mail about 25% is actually mailing it in well as long as you'd yeah As long as you insist on the the dollar to get the catalog the $5 to get the catalog that kind of thing You will get a lot of mail because you get cash We Hardly any catalogs tap go look at the catalogs you get all week long hardly any of them are We've done it sometimes Yeah Oh, yeah, there's the whole metaphor.
